items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Yeesh, this fog is giving me the creeps. I've got a bad feeling about this...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Huh… Wait, what's that huge shadow under the water?

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: It's getting closer.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Watch out!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Behold, my friends! There she stands… Ragunna's Lighthouse of Dawn!

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Here we are! Ragunna's dock.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: You'll find Echo boats ahead to ferry you straight into the heart of Ragunna.

options.text: Are you not going into town?

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Well, the Carnevale hasn't started yet. We're just passing through, lending our friends a hand.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: And a quiet arrival? That's not our style. We'll sail into Ragunna with flair—complete with a dazzling show and the loudest of ovations.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Don't forget to stash some confetti in your pockets for the occasion!

options.text: Thanks for the trip.
Abby, you should say goodbye.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: My pleasure! Speaking of which, where's that charming little companion of yours?

options.text: Abby? Wakey-wakey.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Is it asleep? The fog likely caused this. Don't worry. Echoes will recover when they're out of it.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Oh, and do yourself a favor, try our Nectarwine. They say one drop of the "Gocce di Divino" will let you rendezvous with the Sentinel in your dreams...

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: Ha! That might just be your shortcut to seeing the Sentinel.

items.speaker: Brant
items.text: May the winds be in your favor!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hmm... Wha... Huh? We docked already? Where is Brant and the crew?

options.text: They are gone now.
I tried waking you up just now.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: You did? I didn't hear a thing.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Whoa, this is Ragunna, huh? How do we get into town?

options.text: Let's take a look around first.

items.speaker: Order Deacon
items.text: Go forth, dear pilgrims, on your sacred journey. May the Sentinel guide you as it has guided the returning ships.

items.speaker: Order Deacon
items.text: Go forth, Andreas... "The Fool." The benevolent Primus has blessed you with this sacred pilgrimage. May you find the righteous path on your voyage.

items.speaker: Andreas
items.text: If you're all so righteous, why don't you join the pilgrimage yourselves!

items.speaker: Order Deacon
items.text: Our duty remains here, to shepherd the lost. I grieve for you, my brother... for you have strayed from the truth.

items.speaker: Andreas
items.text: Ha... Haha... Truth... Don't make me laugh...

items.speaker: Order Deacon
items.text: Your transgression is absolved before the sacred Pilgrim's Sail. Go now, and board with humility.
Wait a moment, traveler... While you may harbor doubts, I implore you not to disrupt their pilgrimage.
Perhaps staying silent now would better serve your interests.

options.text: Sorry, and you are?

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Pardon my intrusion. Allow me to introduce myself. I am Cristoforo, a modest playwright visiting Ragunna in search of inspiration for my latest work.

options.text: I'm {PlayerName}.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: A pleasure to make your acquaintance. I'm working on a play—tales of pilgrims striving to reach the Sentinel's promised land...

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Word of a new Pilgrim's Sail about to depart brought me here. I came hoping to glean fresh ideas.

options.text: That ship over there?

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Yes. When Ragunnesi first settled here, they revered the Sentinel. The Carnevale was their tribute—a sacred rite to commune with it.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: It seemed the Sentinel Imperator preferred not to flaunt its power overtly to command the people's awe and respect.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Yet, amidst the Carnevale's revelry, it performed miracles, keeping the people aligned with its guidance.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Legend has it that, moved by its grace, the most devout believer braved storms and mists to find the Sentinel—thus was born the tradition of the Pilgrim's Sail.

items.speaker: Cristoforo
items.text: Should you wish, I have more stories to tell.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: I didn't know all the ships in Ragunna are Echoes. That troupe isn't as special as I thought...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Now I can't even imagine what kind of Echoes we might see in the city.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Maybe we'll come across some that look like you, a whole pack of them.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: You're kidding me... Even in the Land of Echoes, I, Abby, will always be the most special one!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hic!

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: ...Approved. Welcome to Rinascita.

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: Excuse me. First-time visitors must cooperate for inspection.

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: Is this... a Reserved Terminal?

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: Reserved Terminals should be declared upon entry. May I see your declaration form, please?

options.text: ...I didn't know about that.
I didn't declare it.

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: These are the rules. I'll need you to cooperate.

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: Forgive the inconvenience. By the Order's decree, all visitors must undergo customs clearance to ensure safety...

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: ...Or, do you have a guarantor?

options.text: (Show the invitation letter)
Someone invited me here.

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: Ah, I see you are a guest of the Montelli family. You are granted permission to bring your Reserved Terminal into Rinascita.

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: We apologize for any trouble caused. All Echoes, even those in Reserved Terminals, are seen as Divine Envoys. Once they are baptized, they too will receive Imperator's blessings.

options.text: Does that mean I can see the Sentinel in person?
I don't have any plans to do that.

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: Naturally! We are all "united" under the Sentinel's influence, free from "division."

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: The Sentinel is with you, me—all of us.

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: Their presence is eternal in our hearts, guiding us always...

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: Rest assured, for our Sentinel embodies peace, justice, modesty, and mercy. Laud Their name, and you will find solace!

items.speaker: Senior Acolyte
items.text: Their presence is eternal in our hearts, guiding us always...
Preach with respect and patience, lest you induce doubt and confusion.

items.speaker: Serious Acolyte
items.text: Acolyte Phoebe.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: I'll take it from here. Greetings, esteemed guest. I am Phoebe, an Acolyte of the Order.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: The city of Ragunna welcomes your arrival. Many visitors are here for the upcoming Carnevale. To ensure everyone enjoys the festival safely, the Order has tightened the customs procedures and added new regulations...

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Some information might be overlooked on your declaration form. Please accept our apologies.

options.text: It's okay. Rules are rules.
Can we enter the city now?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Thank you for your understanding. Please follow me.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Certainly. Please follow me.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: As the tides receded, a new world and an unexplored adventure awaited you.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Yangyang and Chixia found you unconscious at the Gorges of Spirits. Together, you decided to head to Huanglong's Jinzhou City, marking the beginning of your journey.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Jinzhou, a border city in Huanglong, had long been a battleground against the Threnodian Ovathrax. The Midnight Rangers, led by General Jiyan, fought tirelessly against the waves of Tacet Discords—nightmarish entities created by the Threnodian—near the Norfall Barrens...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Meanwhile, a mysterious organization known as the Fractsidus operated covertly within Jinzhou. They were aiming to resurrect the Threnodian. Somehow, they seemed especially interested in you, going so far as to extend an invitation...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You met Jinhsi, the Magistrate of Jinzhou. She explained the double threats Jinzhou was facing: external attacks from the resurgent Threnodian, and internal turmoil caused by the mysterious disappearance of Jinzhou's Sentinel.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: As the Magistrate and the Sentinel's Resonator, Jinhsi resolved to travel to Mt. Firmament and uncover the truth about Jinzhou's missing Sentinel, Jué. A confrontation seemed unavoidable...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The rise of the TD Outbreak unleashed Ovathrax's latest creation: the Dreamless, an incomplete entity. With Jinzhou City under siege, you joined the battle, eventually defeating the Dreamless and absorbing it with your bare hands.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Jinzhou's immediate crisis was averted, but Magistrate Jinhsi was nowhere to be found...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You sought guidance from Sanhua, who directed you to a ferry near Mt. Firmament. There, you encountered Changli, your "Wayfinder" into the mountain.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: This secret realm, where the flow of time warped and twisted, required a price for entry. However, you seemed curiously unaffected by the temporal distortion, while Changli seemed unbothered by its effects...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Within Mt. Firmament's Hongzhen settlement, you discovered that many animals and residents had been frozen in time, trapped by the erratic temporal flows. The Fractsidus had also infiltrated the area.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Xinyi, the mayor of Hongzhen, informed you that Jinhsi had only recently departed for Mt. Firmament's peak, in search of the Sentinel. Due to the temporal distortions, what had been days to you was merely moments inside the mountain.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Deep within the Mianloong Chamber, you finally found Jinhsi. Together, you faced the Sentinel, Jué. Jué explained its dilemma: to keep its power from spiraling out of control, it had chosen to remain confined within Mt. Firmament.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: If the situation continued, its only recourse would have been to freeze time across all of Jinzhou, hoping future generations could find a solution to undo the damage...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: At the mountain's peak, you stood by Jinhsi as she endured Jué's trial, proving the strength of human will. With your help, she stabilized and inherited the Sentinel's power, finally bringing an end to the temporal chaos on Mt. Firmament...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Jué revealed the truth: You were none other than its Arbiter, the founder of Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Jinhsi's unyielding resolve, coupled with the Temporal Mandate granted by Jué with your approval, allowed her to make it through the impossible trial.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Following Jué’s guidance, you set out on a new path, seeking answers to the mysteries of your origins. Your next destination is the base of an enigmatic organization known as the Black Shores.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You confronted a crisis in the Port City of Guixu alongside Yangyang. Shortly after, the Shorekeeper guided you to the Black Shores, a place shrouded in mystery. The Tethys System of the Black Shores had suffered a catastrophic failure, unleashing data-based pollution that corroded everything it touched.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Once again guided by the Shorekeeper, you delved deeper into the Black Shores, determined not only to save this ravaged place but also to recover memories of your past...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The Shorekeeper revealed that you were once the leader and founder of the Black Shores, an ancient organization spanning ages, with her serving as your loyal assistant.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: The current crisis, it seemed, was intricately tied to your forgotten past, and the Lament recorded by the Tethys System during the disaster in Port City of Guixu held crucial secrets...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: To resolve the chaos caused by the Tethys System, you and the Shorekeeper entered a simulation it had created, reliving the final hour before the Lament struck Port City of Guixu.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: As the disaster drew near, the Tethys System tried to absorb you as its new core. In a desperate bid to protect you, the Shorekeeper was sucked into a black hole...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You reclaimed the mantle of leadership, steering the Black Shores toward redemption. You broke free from the mistakes of the past, liberated the innocent trapped in endless suffering, and rescued the Shorekeeper from the Tethys System's grasp.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Now free from the burden of her mission, the Shorekeeper revealed another clue. She suggested that the key to understanding your connection with Abby—and Abby's recent strange symptoms—might lie within Rinascita.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Rinascita is a nation to the southeast of the Black Shores, making the Black Shores archipelago the perfect starting point for your journey...

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: I found this when searching for information about Abby.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: It remained hidden until the core leak in the Tethys System was finally resolved.

options.text: It's no coincidence you're finding it now.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (That message... I think I should trust it.)

options.text: Who is "Imperator"?

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Imperator is Rinascita's Sentinel.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: It is also the solution Tethys proposes. As Rinascita's Sentinel, Imperator should have the knowledge to fix Abby's weakening frequency.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Rinascita, also called the Land of Echoes, is renowned for its Echo technologies. It's home to many like Abby who have physical forms.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (Rinascita? I may finally learn who Abby really is...)

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: It just so happens that the best time to visit Rinascita is now.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Please take this with you.

items.speaker: Mysterious Invitation with a Fragrance
items.text: To our esteemed business partner,

items.speaker: Mysterious Invitation with a Fragrance
items.text: As the celebrated Carnevale returns to Rinascita, the Montelli family, proud organizers of this grand festival, extend an invitation for you to grace Ragunna with your esteemed presence and partake in the celebrations.

items.speaker: Mysterious Invitation with a Fragrance
items.text: In the spirit of goodwill, we have arranged a modest sum for your use during your stay in Rinascita. These funds are available at your convenience at the Averardo Bank.

items.speaker: Mysterious Invitation with a Fragrance
items.text: The Montelli family holds in high regard each of its many friendships. Should you choose to place the Blake Bloom upon the Golden Scale, we shall consider you our most honored guest and a lifelong friend of the family.

items.speaker: Mysterious Invitation with a Fragrance
items.text: The Montelli family eagerly awaits your arrival.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: The Montellis are one of the leading families in Ragunna, a city-state within Rinascita. Their trade connections with the Black Shores prompted this invitation.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: It is Rinascita's grandest festival. During this time, Ragunna's port relaxes its regulations to welcome visitors.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: "A majestic tribute to our Sentinel!"

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: "Food, wine, light shows, and a masquerade ball, topped with extraordinary Echo performances!"

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: "All are welcome, no matter your wealth or rank! Celebrate with us and let the joy and merriment never end!"

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Yes. It's also an excellent travel destination.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: However... Rinascita is particularly special to the Black Shores.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: The Threnodian's revival in Jinzhou has triggered similar reactions in other countries, with Rinascita as the one exception. We've detected no frequency fluctuations related to Threnodians there.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: While many of our Bloom Bearers have visited Rinascita city-states before, our presence is often met with a hint of skepticism.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Given the circumstances, the best approach would be to visit as a guest of a prominent family.

options.text: Good, let's set out then.
How can we get to Rinascita?

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Are you leaving now?

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Please wait... I'll open a portal for you.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: Ah...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Opening a portal will drain your computing power. I think it's better served for Black Shores operations.

options.text: You needn't worry about this small matter.
It would be better to keep a low profile.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: ...I see.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: I'll have Aalto arrange your transportation to Rinascita then.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: I found this when searching for information about Abby.

items.speaker: Shorekeeper
items.text: It remained hidden until the core leak in the Tethys System was finally resolved.

options.text: It's no coincidence you're finding it now.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (That message... I think I should trust it.)

items.text: Imperator is Rinascita's Sentinel.

items.text: (Rinascita? I may finally learn who Abby really is...)
